messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0176",
  "title": "特别鸣谢 （按照首字母顺序排序）",
  "page_index": 102,
  "page_range": "102-103"
}

Section text:
特别鸣谢 （按照首字母顺序排序）
102

message.content: This section can answer questions regarding: Topics (acknowledgments, contributor credits, funding or institutional support); Entities (individuals, organizations, or institutions acknowledged, though specific names are not provided in the excerpt); and Organization/Structure (alphabetical sorting by initial). It does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or specific evidence types. Retrieval queries should target credited contributor names, affiliations, or support roles typically documented in acknowledgments sections.
